info.description: REST APIs used for interacting with PAAS
info.title: PAAS API

post.description: This endpoint allows add task to ArtWorks PaaS

batchId.description: Tasks must be executed with same priority as first task within this batch

isFast.description: Use fast queue. Quick results, but more costs. Use 'priority' field for more granular control over task priority. If 'priority' is set, 'isFast' will be ignored

content.description:
Message content: can be a string for text-only messages, or an array of content parts for multimodal messages with text and images. Examples:
- Text only message: 'Hello, how can I assist you today?'
- Multimodal message with text and images: [{"type": "text", "text": "Here is an image:"}, {"type": "image_url", "image_url": {"url": "data:image/png;base64,..."}}]
More info:
- https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference/chat/create
- https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/images-vision

image_url.description: Image URL reference (required when type is 'image_url')

url.description: Image reference in format base64 or https:// url

type.description: Type of content part: 'text' for text content or 'image_url' for image references

temperature.description: What sampling temperature to use, between 0 and 2. Higher values like 0.8 will make the output more random, while lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic

image.description: Image reference in format base64 or https:// url
Image reference in format base64 or https:// url
Image reference in format base64 or https:// url

Image reference in format base64 or https:// url

base64.description: If true - return results media files as base64, otherwise return url to download

face.description: Image reference in format base64 or https:// url

face.description: Image reference in format base64 or https:// url

base64.description: If true - return results media files as base64, otherwise return url to download

baseModel.description: Image generation base model. Required if checkpoint is not provided. If both checkpoint and baseModel are provided, the checkpoint must be compatible with the baseModel.

cfgScale.description: flux Controls how closely a prompt should be followed during sampling in Stable Diffusion. It is a setting available in nearly all Stable Diffusion AI image generators

denoisingStrength.description: flux Determines how much noise is added to an image before the sampling steps

image.description: Image reference in format base64 or https:// url

images.description: qwen-image-edit 2511 List of 1 to 3 base64 encoded images. Supported only for Qwen Image Edit model.

items.description: Image reference in format base64 or https:// url

megapixels.description: qwen-image-edit 2511 Megapixels for resizing, from 1.0 to 2.0. Supported only for Qwen Image Edit model.

sharpness.description: sdxl Sampling sharpness is developed by Fooocus as a final solution to the problem that SDXL sometimes generates overly smooth images or images with plastic appearance. Different from other parameters like Automatic1111’s cfg-scale, this sharpness never influences the global structure of images so that it is easy to control and will not mess things up (if you use same random seed). This option is relatively modest so that the image is not likely to be overcooked. This option can solve 90% problems when the SDXL results are overly smooth

size.description:
flux sdxl Image size in "<width>x<height>" format. Each base model has dimensions that provide the best results.
- SD 1.5 sizes: [512x512 768x768 512x768 768x512 576x768 768x576 512x912 912x512]
- SDXL sizes: [704x1408 704x1344 768x1344 768x1280 832x1216 832x1152 896x1152 896x1088 960x1088 960x1024 1024x1024 1024x960 1088x960 1088x896 1152x896 1152x832 1216x832 1280x768 1344x768 1344x704 1408x704 1472x704 1536x640 1600x640 1664x576 1728x576]
- Qwen Image 2509 sizes: [1024x1024 832x1248 1248x832 864x1152 1152x864 768x1344 1344x768 1328x1328 1152x1536 1536x1152 1088x1632 1632x1088 1008x1792 1792x1008]
- Flux models allows generate image any size within 128 - 2048 px

smartCrop.description: qwen-image-edit 2511 Enable or disable smart crop. Supported only for Qwen Image Edit model.

upscale.description: qwen-image-edit 2511 sdxl For qwen only value 2 is supported, for SDXL can be between 1 and 5

Different from other parameters like Automatic1111’s cfg-scale, this sharpness never influences the global structure of images so that it is easy to control and will not mess things up (if you use same random seed). This option is relatively modest so that the image is not likely to be overcooked. This option can solve 90% problems when the SDXL results are overly smooth

image.description: Image reference in format base64 or https:// url

cfgScale.description: Guidance scale. Higher values produce more prompt-aligned audio.

negativePrompt.default: harsh, silence, distorted, clipping, echo, radio, reverbations, whisper
negativePrompt.description: Negative prompt describing sounds to avoid.

prompt.description: Positive prompt describing the desired sound. If empty, the model selects the best prompt.

steps.description: Number of inference steps. More steps improve quality but increase generation time.

video.description: Input video to generate audio for.

source.description: Source language. Special value "auto" - auto detect language

image.description: Image reference in format base64 or https:// url

priority.description: Task execution priority. Lower value means higher priority. Tasks with higher priority are executed faster

tags.description: Optional tags for task categorization and filtering

post.description: Add task and wait for result. This endpoint is intended for testing and debugging purposes, use /tasks endpoint for production integrations.
